Class VaultSecret

java.lang.Object
iu.client.VaultSecret
All Implemented Interfaces:
IuVaultSecret
final class VaultSecret extends Object implements IuVaultSecret
Implements IuVaultSecret.

  • Constructor Details

    • VaultSecret

      VaultSecret(String name, URI uri, Supplier<JsonObject> dataSupplier, Supplier<JsonObject> metadataSupplier, Consumer<JsonObject> mergePatchConsumer, Function<Type, IuJsonAdapter<?>> valueAdapter)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      name - secret name
      uri - data URI
      dataSupplier - supplies the current version of the secret
      metadataSupplier - supplies metadata for the current version of the secret, supplies null for cubbyhole secrets
      mergePatchConsumer - consumes a merge patch for updating the secret
      valueAdapter - value adapter function
